Off Calendar Jan-09-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-17-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Withdraw Admissions
Off Calendar May-12-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF EVAN REEVES' Motion To Withdraw Admissions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion to withdraw admissions to defendant's RFA Nos. 1-15 is granted. The court finds that the admissions were the result of prior counsel's mistake or neglect and that, in light of defendant's nonopposition, the party who obtained the admission will not be substantially prejudiced in maintaining that party's action or defense on the merits. (See CCP 2033.300(b).) The court further rescinds the sanctions order, again in light of defendant's nonopposition. Plaintiff shall serve verified responses without objections to RFA Nos. 1-15 by June 13, 2025.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling, with a cover letter reflecting compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions; Memorandum In Support
Off Calendar Jul-12-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT GSW ARENA LLC'S, ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS GOLDEN STATE WARRIORS, LLC, Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. The unopposed motion of Defendant GSW Arena is granted. Defendant's Request for Admissions Nos. 1-15 are deemed admitted. The request for sanctions is also granted against Plaintiff in the amount of $1,000.00, payable to Defendant GSW Arena LLC through its counsel on or before July 31, 2024.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem to williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
